comment: BIRTHDAY-PARTY domain slice: the event plus RSVP changes that land after the
plan is made. Dates are day_offsets from IClock.Today (generic-clock rule).
pending_updates mirrors the guests.json shape. Seeded with one material change —
three more children RSVP — so the cake/supplies plan has an adaptation beat.
The party guest list is distinct from guests.json, which is the dinner-party set.

pending_updates.description: Three more children RSVP'd yes — headcount is now 23
